step_rationale: Thrombin-activated receptor; core platelet activation mechanism.
mechanism: PAR4 is a thrombin-activated platelet receptor whose signaling drives platelet shape change, aggregation, and secretion during coronary thrombosis.

references.title: Mice Lacking PECAM-1 and Ceacam1 Have Enhanced Platelet Secretion and Thrombus Growth: Novel Link with PAR4.
